description: Ground-truth (obligation -> policy_ids) pairs for RAG eval. 'expected' = must be in top-K; 'acceptable' = related but lower-priority matches.

items.obligation_text: Banks shall put in place a Customer Identification Procedure (CIP) covering name, address, and government-issued ID at account opening.
Banks shall identify and verify beneficial owners holding 25% or more of voting rights in non-individual customers.
Customers shall be categorised as Low, Medium, or High risk and reviewed periodically based on risk category.
Suspicious Transaction Reports shall be filed with FIU-IND within 7 days of detection.
Cash transactions above INR 10 lakh shall be reported via CTR to FIU-IND monthly.
Banks shall maintain CRAR of at least 11.5% including capital conservation buffer.
Liquidity Coverage Ratio shall be maintained at 100% or above and reported monthly.
Board Risk Management Committee shall meet at least quarterly to review risk reports.
Independent directors shall constitute at least one-third of the Board.
Basel III capital adequacy returns shall be submitted to RBI quarterly via XBRL.
All fraud cases shall be reported to RBI within 3 weeks of detection.
Banks shall maintain a Board-approved grievance redressal mechanism resolving complaints within 30 days.
Banks shall maintain a Board-approved Information Security Policy reviewed annually.
Banks shall manage interest rate risk in the banking book using duration and earnings-at-risk metrics monitored by ALCO.
Banks shall have a Board-approved Loan Policy defining credit appraisal standards and concentration limits.
Banks shall classify NPAs and make provisions per RBI IRACP norms with quarterly Board reporting.
